para.as_written: ܫܠܡ ܒܥܘܕܝܢ ܡܪܝܐ ܡܙܡܘܪ̈ܐ ܕܕܘܝܕ ܘܬܫܒ̈ܝ ܕܢ̈ܒܝܐ ܒܝܘܡܐ ܩܕܡܝܐ ܕܐܕܪܝܪܚܐ ܫܢܬ ܐܠܦ ܘܫܬܡܐܐ ܡ̄ܓ ܕܝܘܢ̈ܝܐ. ܒܕܝܪ ܡܩܕܫܐ ܕܛܘܪܣܝܣ ܡܪܝܐ ܢܚܣܐ ܠܟܬܘܒܘܢܐ ܡܚܝܠܐ ܫܐܠ ܐܢܐ ܡܢ ܚܘܒܟܘܢ ܐܚ̈ܝ ܟܠܡܢ ܕܩܪܐ ܢܨܝܚܐܝܬ ܢܨܠܐ ܥܠ ܚܛܝܐ ܕܛܪܛܫ ܠܐ ܦܐܝܐܝܬ ܐܠܗܐ ܢܚܣܐ ܠܡܢ ܕܡ̄ܨ ܠܐ ܥܠܘܗܝ ܒܨܠܘܬܗ̈ ܕܡܪܬܢ ܝܠܕܬ ܐܠܗܐ ܘܕܩ̈ܕܝܫܐ ܘܪ̈ܝܫܐ ܕܢܒܝ̈ܐ ܡܪܡܘܫܐ̤ ܘܐܗܪܘܢ ܘܐܠܝܐ ܘܐܠܝܫܥ ܥܡ ܟܠܗܢܘ ܩܕܝܫܐ ܐܡܝܢ

cataloguer.message: Identification and description of Syriac colophon(s) under the NEH Sinai Data Portal project (2021-2024).

para.as_written: اقول الحقير مخاييل اسقف طور سينا ان هذا / الكتاب محبس موبد على كنيسه السيده السريان / بدير طور سينا فمن اخرجه من الدير او عن كنيسه / السيده يكون محروم مفروز من مجد الله ومار موسى / يكون خصمه
translation: I, the despised bishop of Mount Sinai Mīkhāʼīl, state that this book is eternally dedicated to the church of the Lady, the Syrian, in the monastary of Mount Sinai. Whoever takes it out from the monastery or the church of the Lady is banned and separated from the glory of God and St. Moses is his foe

location.repository: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai

bib.citation: Kāmil, Murād. Catalogue of All Manuscripts in the Monastery of St. Catherine on Mount Sinai. Harrassowitz, 1970

program.label: Sinai Library Digitization Project, Phase 1
program.description: Digitized under the Sinai Library Digitization Project, Phase 1 (2018-2023), a collaboration of St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, with funding from the Arcadia Fund, the Ahmanson Foundation, and the Steinmetz Family Foundation. The project provided high-resolution images and basic description of the Arabic and Syriac manuscripts held in the Monastery’s library.

image_provenance.rights: All manuscript images are the property of St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai. No part of these images may be reproduced, reused, or distributed without prior written permission. For permissions and reuse requests, please contact sinai@library.ucla.edu.
